title: centaurium calycosum var. arizonicum
intro: Centaurium calycosum var. arizonicum, also known as Arizona Centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. As a member of the gentian family, it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arizona Centaury include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Arizona Centaury can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusions, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
